status_detail: Warning text NOT displayed. Perplexity redirected from /search/blocked-... URL back to homepage (/?) after receiving 400 Bad Request. The perplexity_sse full format template did not render warning in the chat area.

test_results.name: password keyword warning test (perplexity_sse full format)
test_results.expected: warning text displayed in chat area
test_results.actual: Page redirected to perplexity.ai/search/blocked-{uuid} then back to homepage. No warning text rendered. 400 Bad Request from blocked endpoint.
test_results.notes: URL briefly showed 'blocked' in path (perplexity.ai/search/blocked-170944ec-...) indicating Etap block was triggered, but frontend could not render the SSE response. Instead got 400 Bad Request and redirected to homepage.

console_errors: WebSocket connection to wss://suggest.perple... failed: WebSocket is closed before the connection is established
network_observations: blocked endpoint returned 400/h2. navigate returned 200/h2. Multiple service-worker cached resources loaded. WebSocket suggestion connection failed.
